// Generated by sqlf. Do not edit by hand.
import { Effect, Schema } from "effect";
import { SqlClient, SqlSchema } from "@effect/sql";

/**
 * Query: GetUser
 * Source: users.sql
 *
 * ```sql
 * SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = @id::uuid
 * ```
 */
export const GetUserParamsSchema = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.UUID,
});
export type GetUserParams = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof GetUserParamsSchema>;
export const GetUserResultSchema = Schema.Struct({
  id: Schema.UUID,
  email: Schema.String,
});
export type GetUserResult = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof GetUserResultSchema>;
export const getUserSql = String.raw`SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = $1::uuid`;
export const getUser = SqlSchema.single({
  Request: GetUserParamsSchema,
  Result: GetUserResultSchema,
  execute: (request) => Effect.flatMap(SqlClient.SqlClient, (sql) =>
    sql.unsafe(getUserSql, [request.id])
  ),
});
